posts.author: billubadshah
posts.community: IDFC First Bank Limited - First Bank Preference for Long Term Investors too?
posts.text: Surprisingly all good news are coming, looks like a way to prop up the price for a good fund raise:0

posts.author: rpm
posts.community: IDFC First Bank Limited - First Bank Preference for Long Term Investors too?
posts.text: Unexpected good news after a really long time. There was a full provision made of approx 800 crores for a toll road outside Mumbai in Maharashtra due to Maharashtra govt suspending toll collection due to covid. We have not heard further about that NPA. I am sure the outstanding amount must have been paid back to the bank by now, after traffic situation normalised after covid. There is also no feedback about the Haryana fraud. Shareholders deserve to know whether the money is coming back ??

posts.author: Nitin_Nimkar
posts.community: IDFC First Bank Limited - First Bank Preference for Long Term Investors too?

posts.author: manishdhariwal
posts.community: IDFC First Bank Limited - First Bank Preference for Long Term Investors too?
posts.text: Dividend is more of a hurdle clearing step - needs to cross the hurdle of a dividend paying bank. if you could give less than 25 paise, vedi would have done that. The bank has consistently faced curve balls - and these are not from outside, but a result of internal weakness - who asked them to go whole hog on MFI, no other universal bank got their numbers dragged like IDFC. Then this fraud - who else can be hele responsible but the management itself.. the cost of all these fracas is borne by us poor shareholders who see their holding diluted at low levels. On the credit side is the admirable N…
